cards.back: A statistical method used to compare means of three or more samples to determine if at least one of the means is different.
To test the significance of differences between group means by comparing the variance within and between groups.
A type of ANOVA used to compare means of two or more groups to determine if at least one of the means is different.
A type of ANOVA used to compare means of three or more groups in two factors, to determine if there is an interaction between the factors.
A type of experimental design used to minimize the effects of extraneous variables, where the same number of experimental units are compared under different treatments in a specific order.
